summary: Iteration 43: Export System for Event Applications - All features tested and working. Backend: 28/28 tests passed. Frontend: All UI elements functional.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: GET /api/events/{event_id}/export/xlsx returns valid XLSX file with status 200
VERIFIED: XLSX contains styled headers, conditional formatting for payment status (green=paid, red=unpaid, yellow=pending)
VERIFIED: XLSX has Czech column names (Jméno, Email, Status, Platba, Částka, VS, Datum přihlášení)
VERIFIED: GET /api/events/{event_id}/export/csv returns valid CSV file with UTF-8 BOM
VERIFIED: CSV uses semicolon separator (European Excel standard)
VERIFIED: CSV contains form field labels (not IDs) as column headers
VERIFIED: GET /api/events/applications/{application_id}/pdf returns valid PDF file (requires auth)
VERIFIED: Public PDF endpoint GET /api/events/public/{institution_id}/application/{application_id}/pdf works without auth
VERIFIED: Application submission response includes pdf_url field
VERIFIED: PDF contains institution name, event name, applicant data, payment info with QR code
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Applications tab shows XLSX and CSV export buttons (data-testid: export-xlsx, export-csv)
VERIFIED: Admin UI - Each application card has PDF download button (data-testid: pdf-{app_id})
VERIFIED: Public UI - Success page shows 'Stáhnout potvrzení (PDF)' button (data-testid: download-pdf-btn)
seed_data_creation: None - used existing test data (event 'Za uměním do Lázní' with applications)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Export system fully implemented and tested. XLSX uses openpyxl with styled headers and conditional formatting. CSV has UTF-8 BOM and semicolon separator. PDF uses reportlab with QR codes via qrcode library. Public PDF endpoint allows download without auth. Auth uses httpOnly cookies. Event 'Za uměním do Lázní' (e7ed3b6d-6d9f-4d73-aae1-e818a153e291) has multiple applications for testing.

verified_features.feature: GET /api/events/{event_id}/export/xlsx returns valid XLSX file with status 200
GET /api/events/{event_id}/export/csv returns valid CSV file with UTF-8 BOM
verified_features.evidence: CSV starts with EF BB BF (UTF-8 BOM), uses semicolon separator
API returns 200 with Content-Type: application/pdf, file starts with %PDF

verified_features.feature: Public PDF endpoint works without auth
Application submission response includes pdf_url field
XLSX contains styled headers, conditional formatting for payment status
verified_features.evidence: xl/styles.xml contains fill and font definitions for conditional formatting

verified_features.feature: CSV uses semicolon separator and contains form field labels
verified_features.evidence: Header row uses Czech labels (Jméno, Email, Status, Platba, etc.) not field IDs

verified_features.feature: PDF contains institution name, event name, applicant data, payment info with QR
verified_features.evidence: PDF generated by reportlab with QR code via qrcode library

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Applications tab shows XLSX and CSV export buttons
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows XLSX and CSV buttons with data-testid attributes

verified_features.feature: Admin UI: Each application card has PDF download button
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows PDF buttons on each application card

verified_features.feature: Public UI: Success page shows PDF download button
verified_features.evidence: Screenshot shows 'Stáhnout potvrzení (PDF)' button on success page

ui_test_results.applications_tab: PASS - Shows applications with export buttons
ui_test_results.pdf_buttons_on_cards: PASS - 3 PDF buttons found on application cards
ui_test_results.public_success_page: PASS - Shows QR code, payment info, PDF download button
